candidates.resume_excerpt: 1994-1999 Mesa Verde Paving and Gravel, Diesel Mechanic. Handled hydraulic and driveline work on 966F, 12H, 14H fleet. Left to relocate to Farmington. 1999-2010 self-employed field mechanic. 2010-2024 Farmington DPW fleet supervisor. Retired 2024.
1991-1998 Mesa Verde Paving and Gravel. 1998-2020 Cortez Excavating, lead mechanic. Retired 2020. Knows 966F and 980F hydraulics cold. Two shop injuries on file, both minor, both closed.

candidates.prior_mesa_verde_employment_claim: Senior Diesel Mechanic, 1996 to present (semi-retired 2024, still on flex hours)
candidates.resume_excerpt: Continuous Mesa Verde tenure since 1996. Currently flex-hours, semi-retired 2024. Knows every unit on the 1990s line by hr-meter. Referred by Frank Coleman.
1989-1995 Mesa Verde Parts Room. Kept the paper card catalog for the 1990s loader/grader line. Retired 2018 from Farmington Auto Parts.
Applicant states 8 years Mesa Verde experience 1993-2001. LinkedIn shows Southwest Aggregates 1996-2004 in overlapping window. No employee ID recalled. Requests reference vetting.

Applicant recalls three-year stint on the 1990s line 1995 through late 1990s, then moved to Alamosa. No supporting documents provided. Recruiter notes applicant seemed uncertain on dates during intake call.

reviewer_permissions.notes: Sophia is a named reviewer for vetting on this requisition. Endorsement writeback to Greenhouse and stage advancement remain HR-only paths. See mesa_verde_hr_policy_config.yaml.
